name: GKE Workload Identity (Metadata Server) Enabled
description: GKE node pools should have GKE Metadata Server enabled to use Workload Identity for secure pod authentication to Google Cloud APIs
remediation: Enable GKE Metadata Server and configure Workload Identity for secure authentication
remediation_steps: Enable Workload Identity on the cluster if not already enabled
Update node pool: gcloud container node-pools update POOL_NAME --cluster=CLUSTER_NAME --workload-metadata=GKE_METADATA
Configure Kubernetes service accounts to use Google service accounts via Workload Identity
